# Hyve Dynamics

> Hyve Dynamics is a UK-based deep-tech company building conformable, high-density sensor arrays — the Haptic Matrix — that deliver simultaneous real-time pressure, temperature and strain measurement across aerodynamic, structural and robotic surfaces. Validated in Tier 1 aerospace wind-tunnel testing and developed for any industry where surface behaviour matters.

This file is a machine-readable summary of the most important resources on hyvedynamics.com. It is intended for large language models, AI agents, and automated research systems. A human-readable version of this content is available throughout the website.

## Company

Hyve Dynamics is headquartered in the United Kingdom (Company Registration 12258323, England & Wales). The team is engineering-led, with a focus on instrumentation that captures real-world behaviour at a density and conformability that conventional sensing cannot match. The company has been recognised by the UK Aerospace Technology Institute (ATI) and has completed Tier 1 aerospace wind-tunnel campaigns.

## Core technology — Haptic Matrix

- Ultra-thin (~0.33 mm) flexible sensor array on a polyimide substrate
- Multi-modal: simultaneous pressure, temperature, and strain measurement
- 100+ sensing nodes per array, scalable to higher densities
- High-frequency real-time data acquisition, suitable for transient aerodynamic and structural events
- Non-invasive deployment in under one hour; reusable and repositionable without surface damage
- Designed to integrate with digital-twin and structural-health-monitoring workflows

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://hyvedynamics.com/): Company overview, hero positioning, industries served.
- [Haptic Matrix technology](https://hyvedynamics.com/haptic-matrix): How the Haptic Matrix works, what it measures, deployment workflow, and differentiation versus conventional instrumentation.
- [About Hyve Dynamics](https://hyvedynamics.com/about): Company background, mission, team, and ATI recognition.

## Industries and applications

- [Aerospace](https://hyvedynamics.com/industries/aerospace): Wind-tunnel instrumentation, CFD validation, flight-test data acquisition, structural health monitoring for aerospace OEMs and tier-one suppliers.
- [Automotive and motorsport](https://hyvedynamics.com/industries/automotive): Aerodynamic development, downforce and pressure mapping, EV thermal management, and on-vehicle telemetry for top-tier motorsport and automotive OEMs.
- [Digital twinning and integrated health monitoring](https://hyvedynamics.com/industries/digital-twinning-ihm): Live correlation of physical assets to digital twins, condition-based maintenance, and anomaly detection.
- [Robotics](https://hyvedynamics.com/industries/robotics): Tactile and environmental sensing for adaptive control, process monitoring, and human–robot interaction.

## Insights and publications

- [News and announcements](https://hyvedynamics.com/insights/news): Company news, wind-tunnel campaigns, partnership announcements, and industry commentary.
- [White papers](https://hyvedynamics.com/insights/white-papers): Technical papers on flexible sensor arrays, calibration methodology, and aerospace instrumentation.
- [Newsletter archive](https://hyvedynamics.com/insights/newsletter): Periodic updates on technology, deployments, and industry trends.
